task_name: Add Phase Scanner Coverage Map Consistency Test
goal: Add a local consistency test that verifies Phase Scanner fixture files are covered by the fixture test list and coverage map.
claims: BP-036 adds a consistency test for Phase Scanner coverage documentation.
BP-036 verifies each input fixture has an output fixture, is listed in the golden fixture test, and is named in the coverage map.
BP-036 wires the consistency test into the shared Bluepilot review suite.
assumptions: Coverage map rows mention input fixture file names exactly.
The fixture test list remains a static cases array that can be checked textually.
No runtime or fixture edits are needed for this block.
dod: The test checks input/output fixture pairs.
The test checks fixture test registration.
stop_conditions: Coverage map or fixture edits become necessary
Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or external system behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-035 documented Phase Scanner fixture coverage and explicitly required future fixtures to be listed in the coverage map.
